## Summary

<!-- What changes does this PR introduce, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `ci` ‚Äî CI/build change
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî tooling/meta

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g., `feat: add X`)
- [ ] Affected skill files have valid YAML frontmatter
- [ ] README updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] No hardcoded topic names in `quiz`/`progress` skills
- [ ] Tested locally with a Claude Code session

<!-- Anything specific to call out ‚Äî edge cases, trade-offs, follow-ups. -->
